name: Wuxi Acryl Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuxi Acryl Technology Co., Ltd. produces and sells polyester, acrylic, polyurethane, high-performance epoxy, and special application resins in China. The company offers isobornyl acrylates and methacrylates, cycloaliphatic acrylates, and polyether amines. It also provides polymers for optical apparatus; and special composite materials. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Wuxi, China.
